stemHtml: The aircraft has been subject of unlawful interference, the pilots have made a successful communication with ATC. Then they change their flight level...

options.a: They do not need to establish contact with ATC and may descend to any level, regulation does not apply to them.
options.b: They do not need to notify ATC about the level change as positive contact has been previously established.
options.c: They do not need to notify ATC about the level change as they're subject of an act of unlawful interference.
options.d: They shall notify ATC about the level change so that ATC can minimise conflict with other aircraft.
